© Internet Alchemy, Inc. 4
Where else can people find solutions
to the problems you’re solving in your
webinar/product?
Make A List Of
• Products
• Blogs
• Webinars
• Classes
• Services (software, done-for-you)
• Videos
• Consultants/coaches
Competitive Products
• Description of the product (what’s offered)
• Price
• The problems it claims to solve

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. 5
Webinars
• Search hint [your problem] +webinar
• Title
• Description
• Problems they are solving
Pay Special Attention To Ads
• What are other people advertising on searches for the
problems your product and webinar solves?
• Ads are a good indication that people are making money
by providing solutions to these problems
• So don’t be scared off, they’re a good thing!
• What specifically are they advertising?
• Price point, description, problems solved
YOUR
MISSION:
To identify as
many
competitive
sources as you
can
